contraindications.name: Gastritis
contraindications.description: Inflammation of the stomach lining. Avoid spicy, acidic, fried foods, alcohol, and caffeine.

contraindications.name: Diabetes
contraindications.description: Metabolic disorder affecting blood sugar levels. Limit refined carbohydrates, sugars, and high-glycemic foods.

contraindications.name: Hypertension (High Blood Pressure)
contraindications.description: Elevated blood pressure. Reduce sodium intake, processed meats, and salty foods.

contraindications.name: High Cholesterol
contraindications.description: Elevated blood cholesterol levels. Limit saturated fats, trans fats, and cholesterol-rich foods.

contraindications.name: Celiac Disease
contraindications.description: Autoimmune disorder triggered by gluten. Avoid all foods containing wheat, barley, and rye.

contraindications.name: Lactose Intolerance
contraindications.description: Inability to digest lactose in dairy products. Avoid milk, cheese, yogurt, and dairy-based ingredients.

contraindications.name: Nut Allergy
contraindications.description: Allergic reaction to tree nuts and peanuts. Avoid all nut products and foods processed in facilities with nuts.

contraindications.name: Shellfish Allergy
contraindications.description: Allergic reaction to crustaceans and mollusks. Avoid shrimp, crab, lobster, clams, and other shellfish.

contraindications.name: Fish Allergy
contraindications.description: Allergic reaction to finned fish. Avoid all fish species and fish-derived ingredients.

contraindications.name: Kidney Disease
contraindications.description: Impaired kidney function. Limit sodium, potassium, phosphorus, and protein intake.

contraindications.name: Gout
contraindications.description: Arthritis caused by uric acid crystals. Avoid organ meats, certain seafood, alcohol, and high-purine foods.

contraindications.name: Pancreatitis
contraindications.description: Inflammation of the pancreas. Avoid fatty foods, alcohol, and fried items.

contraindications.name: GERD (Gastroesophageal Reflux Disease)
contraindications.description: Chronic acid reflux. Avoid acidic foods, spicy foods, chocolate, mint, and caffeine.

contraindications.name: IBS (Irritable Bowel Syndrome)
contraindications.description: Digestive disorder causing abdominal pain and altered bowel habits. Limit high-FODMAP foods, beans, and certain vegetables.

diets.name: Vegetarian
diets.description: Plant-based diet that excludes meat, poultry, and seafood but may include dairy and eggs.

diets.name: Vegan
diets.description: Strict plant-based diet that excludes all animal products including dairy, eggs, and honey.

diets.name: Ketogenic (Keto)
diets.description: Very low-carb, high-fat diet that puts the body into ketosis for fat burning.

diets.name: Paleo
diets.description: Diet based on foods presumed to be available to Paleolithic humans. Excludes grains, legumes, dairy, and processed foods.

diets.name: Mediterranean
diets.description: Diet inspired by eating patterns of Mediterranean countries. Emphasizes fruits, vegetables, whole grains, olive oil, and fish.

diets.name: Low Calorie
diets.description: Diet focused on reducing caloric intake for weight management. Emphasizes nutrient-dense, low-calorie foods.

diets.name: Gluten-Free
diets.description: Diet that excludes gluten protein found in wheat, barley, and rye. Essential for celiac disease management.
